value_chain_position: Process control equipment (inspection + metrology) — every leading-edge wafer must pass through KLA tools; defect control becomes more critical as geometry shrinks.
relative_comps: KLA holds ~50% share of the process-control equipment market with near-monopoly positions in bright-field and e-beam inspection. Process control spend grows as a percentage of total WFE as node complexity increases, structurally advantaging KLA over deposition/etch peers. FCF margin of 31% is best-in-class; 3-year revenue CAGR of ~10% is steady. Trades at ~28x forward earnings vs AMAT at ~22x, a premium reflecting its less cyclical end-market mix (logic >memory).
